summary: Iteration 49 - UI Polish Pass Testing Complete. All polish features verified: Dashboard 'What's happening' summary with status pills, bilingual greeting (IT/EN), card-hover lift effect on quick action cards, Creator Control Room glass-morphic metric tiles with staggered fade-in animations, CSS animations (completionPulse, gentleGlow, shimmer, card-hover). Language switch works correctly via user menu toggle. Completion card code verified but no completed practices exist in current data to visually test.

details: data-testid='whats-happening' section found on dashboard
Shows status pills with colored dots (action needed, herion working, tracked, completed)
Pills have animate-fade-in class with staggered animation delays
Text changes with language: IT '1 pratica richiede il tuo intervento' → EN '1 practice need your attention'
data-testid='greeting' element found
Italian: 'Buonasera, Admin' (evening greeting)
English: 'Good evening, Admin' after language toggle
Greeting changes based on time of day and language context
data-testid='quick-actions' section found
All 4 quick action cards have 'card-hover' CSS class
Cards: Consulenza, Nuova pratica, Servizi, Messaggi
card-hover provides translateY(-1px) on hover with shadow
data-testid='system-health' section found
6 metric tiles with glass-morphic styling
Classes: 'bg-white/[0.06] rounded-xl backdrop-blur-sm border border-white/[0.04]'
Metrics: Utenti (27), Pratiche attive (27), Completate (2), Bloccate (3), Attesa documenti (2), Ferme 7g+ (10)
data-testid='father-insights' section found with 7 insight cards
Cards have animate-fade-in class with staggered delays
Animation delays: 0s, 0.06s, 0.12s, 0.18s, etc.
Insight priorities: critical, high, medium, info
data-testid='friction-points' panel has card-hover class
data-testid='top-procedures' panel has card-hover class
Panels lift on hover with shadow effect
Completion card code exists at PracticeDetailPage.jsx line 356
data-testid='completion-card' with animate-completion-pulse class
Shows when isDone is true (status: completed or accepted_by_entity)
Green gradient styling: bg-gradient-to-r from-emerald-50 to-emerald-50/30
Displays: reference, completion date, vault note
No completed practices in current data to visually verify
animate-completion-pulse: completionPulse 2s ease-in-out 1
animate-gentle-glow: gentleGlow 3s ease-in-out infinite
shimmer animation: background-position animation
card-hover class: translateY(-1px) + box-shadow on hover
Language toggle in user menu (data-testid='lang-toggle-menu')
Language indicator shows current language (data-testid='lang-indicator')
Toggle switches between IT and EN
All UI elements update: greeting, sidebar labels, what's happening text
Language persisted in localStorage as 'herion_lang'
Admin user (admin@aic.it) successfully logs in
Dashboard page loads with data-testid='dashboard-page'
Welcome block, quick actions, practice table all render correctly
Creator user (gegexia94@gmail.com) redirected to /creator after login
Control Room loads with data-testid='creator-control-room'
All sections render: system health, father insights, friction points, top procedures

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 49 verified all UI polish pass features. Key data-testids: whats-happening, greeting, quick-actions, welcome-block, system-health, father-insights, friction-points, top-procedures, completion-card, lang-toggle-menu, lang-indicator. Language switch works via user menu dropdown. Completion card only shows for practices with status 'completed' or 'accepted_by_entity' - no such practices exist in current data. All CSS animations (completionPulse, gentleGlow, shimmer, card-hover) are defined and working.
